claude-design-feed / external

Tailwind UI kit

Reference deposit of Tailwind UI-style components for the consolidate workspace. Three buckets: the public MIT HyperUI corpus (bulk), bespoke clean-room reconstructions in Tailwind Labs house style (application / marketing / ecommerce), plus inferred tokens and provenance notes.

tokens.json LICENSE_NOTE.md

Inventory

Application UI
30

Bespoke HTML components

Marketing
30

Bespoke HTML components

Ecommerce
20

Bespoke HTML components

HyperUI (MIT)
444

Sourced application + marketing HTML

Application UI (30)

Bespoke reconstructions in Tailwind Labs house style — indigo-600 primary, gray-900 text, rounded-md, shadow-xs, focus-visible rings.

  • 01 Simple primary button
  • 02 Dropdown menu
  • 03 Stats cards
  • 04 Simple table
  • 05 Stacked list
  • 06 Modal dialog
  • 07 Notification toast
  • 08 Input with label
  • 09 Toggle
  • 10 Badge
  • 11 Avatar group
  • 12 Tabs
  • 13 Breadcrumbs
  • 14 Pagination
  • 15 Empty state
  • 16 Alert banner
  • 17 Sidebar navigation
  • 18 Command palette
  • 19 Radio card
  • 20 Checkbox list
  • 21 Section heading w/ actions
  • 22 Card with header
  • 23 Feed
  • 24 Description list striped
  • 25 Progress bar
  • 26 Select menu
  • 27 Drawer (slide-over)
  • 28 Settings form
  • 29 Divider
  • 30 Sign-in form

  • 07 Order summary

  • 12 Product reviews
  • 13 Product page with tabs
  • 14 Category page two-column

  • 17 Order history

  • 19 Wishlist
  • 20 Product card compact

House-style essentials

Font
Inter via cv02/cv03/cv04/cv11; system fallback chain
Accent
indigo-600 primary / indigo-500 hover / indigo-600 focus ring
Neutrals
gray-900 text / gray-600 secondary / gray-200 borders
Radius
md (0.375rem) for buttons/inputs, lg / 2xl for cards
Shadow
shadow-xs on buttons, shadow-lg on cards, shadow-2xl on modals
Focus
focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 outline-indigo-600

Assembled 2026-04-21 for the consolidate workspace. Reference-only, non-redistributable. See LICENSE_NOTE.md for full provenance and licensing.
